case_title: ARCH BAY HOLDINGS LLC VS. MERCEDES ABARCA

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCH BAY HOLDINGS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ABARCA, MERCEDES DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCH BAY HOLDINGS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABARCA, MERCEDES DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1533 NEWHALL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES .
